data.title: Citizens Financial increases stock buyback authorization to $1.5B
data.description:
Financial institution Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) announced on Friday an increase in its share repurchase authorization to $1.5B.

Shares were -1.24% pre-market to $40.66.

The company had announced a $1.25B stock buyback program in June last year. A $300M of capacity is remaining under the prior authorization.

The repurchases may be executed in the open market or in privately negotiated transactions.

data.title: FB Financial, Southern States Bancshares get regulatory approvals for merger
data.description:
Bank holding companies FB Financial (NYSE:FBK) and Southern States Bancshares (NASDAQ:SSBK) announced on Thursday receipt of regulatory approvals to complete the proposed merger.

The two companies jointly reported their entry into a definitive merger agreement in March under which Southern States will be merged with and into FB Financial.

The transaction is expected to close on July 1.

data.title: Cloudflare prices $1.75B convertible notes offering
data.description:
Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) has priced its private offering of $1.75B aggregate principal amount of Convertible Senior Notes due 2030.

The company also granted the initial purchasers of the notes a 13-day option to purchase up to an additional $250M aggregate principal amount of the notes solely to cover over-allotments.

The notes will not bear regular interest will mature on June 15, 2030, unless earlier redeemed, repurchased, or converted in accordance with their terms.

The notes will be convertible at an initial conversion rate of 4.0376 shares of Cloudflare’s Class A common stock per $1,000 principal amount of notes, equivalent to an initial conversion price of ~$247.67 a share, which represents a conversion premium of ~45% to Cloudflare’s last reported sale price.

The sale is expected to settle on June 17, 2025, subject to customary closing conditions, and result in approximately $1.72B in net proceeds (assuming no exercise of the initial purchasers’ option to purchase additional notes).

Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) intends to use the proceeds from the offering to pay the cost of the capped call transactions and any remaining proceeds for general corporate purposes.

NET -2.78% premarket.

Source: Press Release

data.title: Hyperscale Data subsidiary Sentinum anticipates annual bitcoin mining run rate of ~$41 million
data.description:
• Hyperscale Data (NYSE:GPUS) Friday said that its wholly owned subsidiary, Sentinum, expects that starting in July 2025, it will be mining an aggregate of approximately 375.24 Bitcoin per year.
  • Such operations would represent a current Bitcoin mining annual run rate of approximately $41 million worth of Bitcoin.
  • The mining run rate is based upon a recent Bitcoin price of approximately $108,000.

data.title: Trump pressures Iran to close nuclear deal following Israel’s attack
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump, in post on the Truth Social platform, urged Iran to close a nuclear deal in his first public statement following Israel’s attack on the country.

Israel launched an attack on Iran, targeting dozens of sites, including nuclear facilities. Its Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the attack would take “many days.” Iran confirmed that one of the targets, the Natanz nuclear facility, sustained damage.

Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi called the attack a “declaration of war” in a letter to the UN Security Council, calling for immediate action from the body.

Trump, meanwhile, claimed that Israel has “a lot” of US military equipment and “they know how to use it.”

“It will only get worse! There has already been great death and destruction, but there is still time to make this slaughter, with the next already planned attacks being even more brutal, come to an end. Iran must make a deal, before there is nothing left,” Trump said in his post.

Iran’s Defense Minister Aziz Nasirzadeh has said previously, “If [talks] don’t reach a resolution] and conflict is imposed on use, the other side will undoubtedly suffer greater losses … We will target all U.S. bases in host countries without hesitation.”

Oil prices surged as much as 13% on Friday before trimming gains after Israel launched a series of strikes on Iran, stoking concerns of a broader conflict in a region responsible for about a third of global crude output.

WTI (CL1:COM) was up 9.15% at $74.27 a barrel at the time of writing.

ETFs: (NYSEARCA:USO), (BNO), (UCO), (SCO), (USL), (DBO), (DRIP), (GUSH), (USOI), (UNG), (BOIL), (KOLD), (UNL), (FCG)

U.S. market-tied ETFs: (SP500), (SPY), (VOO), (IVV), (RSP), (SSO), (UPRO), (SH), (SDS), (SPXU)

Dear readers: We recognize that politics often intersects with the financial news of the day, so we invite you to click here to join the separate political discussion.

data.title: Kennedy-Wilson announces $173M acquisition of multifamily community The Danforth
data.description:
Real estate investment company Kennedy-Wilson Holdings (NYSE:KW) announced on Friday the acquisition of multifamily community, The Danforth, in Seattle for $173M in a joint investment.

KW plans to complete the acquisition in a joint investment with the real estate-related services providers, Kenedix and Hulic.

Kennedy-Wilson, with a 10% interest by investing $6.6M of equity in the core plus joint venture, is set to serve as an asset manager for the partnership and earn customary fees

The 265-unit multifamily community has Whole Foods as the sole ground-floor tenant.

data.title: Santacruz Silver Mining reports Q1 results
data.description:
• Santacruz Silver Mining press release (OTCPK:SCZMF): Q1 Revenue of $70.3M.
  • Net Income of $9.5 million, a 93% decrease year-over-year.
  • Adjusted EBITDA of $27.5 million, a 2202% increase year-over-year.
  • Cash and cash equivalents of $32.5 million, a 706% increase year-over-year.
  • Cash cost per silver equivalent ounce sold ($/oz) of $17.84, a 16% decrease year-over-year.
  • AISC per silver equivalent ounce sold of $22.34, a 8% decrease year-over-year.
  • Silver Equivalent Ounces produced of 3,688,129, a 5% decrease year-over-year.
  • In Q1 2025, the company processed 471,773 tonnes of ore, producing 3,688,129 silver equivalent ounces. This total includes 1,590,063 ounces of silver and 20,719 tonnes of zinc.
